mapper.select: SELECT id, sender_id, receiver_id, last_message, last_message_at, sender_deleted, receiver_deleted, created_at, updated_at FROM message_threads WHERE (sender_id = #{senderId} AND receiver_id = #{receiverId}) OR (sender_id = #{receiverId} AND receiver_id = #{senderId}) ORDER BY updated_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT t.id AS threadId, CASE WHEN t.sender_id = #{userId} THEN t.receiver_id ELSE t.sender_id END AS opponentId, u.nickname AS opponentNickname, COALESCE(u.main_character_name, '') AS opponentMainCharacterName, t.last_message AS lastMessage, t.last_message_at AS lastMessageAt, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM messages m WHERE m.thread_id = t.id AND m.receiver_id = #{userId} AND m.read_yn = FALSE AND m.deleted_by_receiver = FALSE ) AS unreadCount FROM message_threads t JOIN public.users u ON u.user_id = CASE WHEN t.sender_id = #{userId} THEN t.receiver_id ELSE t.sender_id END WHERE (t.sender_id = #{userId} AND t.sender_deleted = FALSE) OR (t.receiver_id = #{userId} AND t.receiver_deleted = FALSE) ORDER BY t.last_message_at DESC, t.id DESC

SELECT m.id AS id, m.thread_id AS threadId, m.sender_id AS senderId, sender.nickname AS senderNickname, m.receiver_id AS receiverId, receiver.nickname AS receiverNickname, m.content AS content, m.read_yn AS readYn, m.created_at AS createdAt, CASE WHEN m.sender_id = #{userId} THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS mine FROM messages m JOIN public.users sender ON sender.user_id = m.sender_id JOIN public.users receiver ON receiver.user_id = m.receiver_id WHERE m.thread_id = #{threadId} ORDER BY m.created_at ASC, m.id ASC

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM messages m JOIN message_threads t ON t.id = m.thread_id WHERE m.receiver_id = #{userId} AND m.read_yn = FALSE AND m.deleted_by_receiver = FALSE AND ( (t.sender_id = #{userId} AND t.sender_deleted = FALSE) OR (t.receiver_id = #{userId} AND t.receiver_deleted = FALSE) )
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO message_threads ( sender_id, receiver_id, last_message, last_message_at, sender_deleted, receiver_deleted ) VALUES ( #{senderId}, #{receiverId}, #{lastMessage}, NOW(), FALSE, FALSE )

INSERT INTO messages ( thread_id, sender_id, receiver_id, content, read_yn, deleted_by_sender, deleted_by_receiver ) VALUES ( #{threadId}, #{senderId}, #{receiverId}, #{content}, FALSE, FALSE, FALSE )
mapper.update: UPDATE messages SET read_yn = TRUE, updated_at = NOW() WHERE thread_id = #{threadId} AND receiver_id = #{userId} AND read_yn = FALSE AND deleted_by_receiver = FALSE

UPDATE message_threads SET sender_deleted = CASE WHEN sender_id = #{userId} THEN TRUE ELSE sender_deleted END, receiver_deleted = CASE WHEN receiver_id = #{userId} THEN TRUE ELSE receiver_deleted END, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{threadId} AND (sender_id = #{userId} OR receiver_id = #{userId})
UPDATE message_threads SET sender_deleted = FALSE, receiver_deleted = FALSE, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{threadId}
UPDATE message_threads SET last_message = #{lastMessage}, last_message_at = NOW(), sender_deleted = FALSE, receiver_deleted = FALSE, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{threadId}
